name: Stickman War
author: Poki
description: Come battle the mighty army of Stickmen! In this stickman game you’ll be challenged level after level to shoot down as many stickmen as you can. But be careful, they’ll come at you from all sides. Kill them all and you’ll pass to the next level! Controls: Mouse - Click and move to shoot Space - Reload Tips and tricks: It takes some time to reload so make sure you plan ahead! Go for headshots for extra impact! About the creator: Stickman War is created by QKY Games.
